notes: Default Ex-3 producer examples for SDK contract roundtrip tests. Stage-2.7 P1 follow-up: regenerated to satisfy contracts.schemas.Ex3CandidateGraphDelta (DeltaId/delta_type/source_node NodeId/target_node NodeId/relation_type/properties/evidence). produced_at + ex_type are SDK envelope fields stripped before contracts.model_validate.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-a
valid_examples.notes: Minimal valid Ex-3 candidate graph delta payload covering every required contracts.schemas.Ex3CandidateGraphDelta field.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-b
valid_examples.notes: Second valid Ex-3 candidate graph delta payload with multiple evidence references.

invalid_examples.name: layer-b-receipt-id-leak
invalid_examples.notes: Ingest metadata guard: layer_b_receipt_id is owned by ingest and must not appear in producer payloads.

invalid_examples.name: missing-produced-at
invalid_examples.notes: Producer-owned required field guard: SDK Ex-3 requires produced_at for routing even though it's stripped before contracts.model_validate.

invalid_examples.name: unknown-ex-type
invalid_examples.notes: Unknown Ex type guard: Ex-9 is not a supported producer payload type.

invalid_examples.name: wrong-ex-type-for-produced-shape
invalid_examples.notes: Ex type mismatch guard: produced_at payloads must not be declared as Ex-0.
